creator: markd@Kermodei.COM
text:
tcl8.6 does not all of the supplied packages are installed by the port.  msgcat is missing. Do a 

tclsh8.6
% clock format [clock seconds]
can't find package msgcat 1.4

same happens with 8.5:

tclsh8.5
% clock format [clock seconds]
can't find package msgcat 1.4

Fix: 

install library/msgcat module
How-To-Repeat: tclsh8.6
% clock format [clock seconds]
